summary: Made surgical seam edits to strengthen the handoff from chapter 1 and keep chapter 2's opening structurally distinct from chapter 3, while adding one light overnight cue that supports the next-morning transition.
edits: Reframed the opening through the kitchen threshold instead of a repeated walk-home arrival scaffold.
Shifted the screen-door beat so the scene begins with Della already inside the house.
Added a small late-night oilcloth cue to support the chapter 3 morning handoff.
